annotations.NEEDS-APPROVAL: Needs legal approval for product or service usage, ok for internal use.
annotations.NO-SPDX: No SPDX ID exists for license.
annotations.AGPL-WARNING: Can’t be linked in any way (no static or dynamic linking) to IBM code. Any interaction needs to be at arms length through the command line or other system level interaction. This will need your executive’s approval, so be sure to connect with your release manager or squad leader as soon as you identify the need to use this license.
annotations.GPL-LINK-WARNING: Can’t be linked in any way (no static or dynamic linking) to IBM code. Any interaction needs to be at arms length through the command line or other system level interaction. This will need your executive’s approval, so be sure to connect with your release manager or squad leader as soon as you identify the need to use this license.
annotations.LGPL-LINK-WARNING: Only dynamic linking is allowed to IBM code. This license needs IBM executive approval.
annotations.CC-BY-SAAS: SaaS usage of CC-BY 2.0/2.5 /3.0/4.0 license, will no longer require a notice with a URI linking to the full text of the CC-BY license and download location.
annotations.CC-BY-ON-PREM: For on-premise distribution of CC-BY, the primary requirement of providing notice and SLC still applies.
annotations.CDLA-PERMISSIVE: The CDLA Sharing license is preferred for data contributions, but the CDLA permissive can also be approved.
annotations.CDLA-SHARING: This is the preferred license for data contributions, and is also acceptable for use in products and services.
annotations.LEGAL-REVIEW-NEEDED-PII: The legal review ensures privacy, personal information, and other aspects specific to data are reviewed.
